response.global_analysis: The video consists of a spoken outro by Shirakami Fubuki followed by a musical medley of her original songs ('FBKINGDOM ANTHEM', 'Say! Fanfare!', 'Bokura no Seiza', and 'Hi Friends!'). The provided JSON reference only covered 'Say! Fanfare!' and missed the medley structure; I have ignored the irrelevant lyrics and manually transcribed the audio for all four songs and the intro dialogue. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal cues and split for readability and semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: ハロウィンパーティー、いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How was the Halloween party?

subtitles.original: ちゃんとこちら側の王国に戻ってこられていますか？
subtitles.english: Were you able to return to this side's kingdom?

subtitles.original: 冥界の女王様に気に入られてしまうと
subtitles.english: If the Queen of the Underworld takes a liking to you,

subtitles.original: 魂を奪われてしまって、帰ってこられませんからね。
subtitles.english: she might steal your soul, and you won't return.

subtitles.original: 戻ってこられてラッキーでした。
subtitles.english: You were lucky to be able to return.

subtitles.original: なんて。
subtitles.english: Just kidding.

subtitles.original: あ、今日のお話はどうでしたか？
subtitles.english: Oh, how was today's story?

subtitles.original: 楽しかったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Did you enjoy it?

subtitles.original: 私が特にお気に入りは、探偵のお話でして。
subtitles.english: My particular favorite was the detective story.

subtitles.original: 今回お聞かせできて、とっても嬉しかったです。
subtitles.english: I was very happy to be able to tell it to you.

subtitles.original: そうだ。いつかあなたのお話も聞かせてくださいね。
subtitles.english: That's right. Please tell me your story someday.

subtitles.original: もしかすると、あの本に、
subtitles.english: Perhaps, in that book...

subtitles.original: あなたのお話も書き記されるかもしれませんよ。
subtitles.english: ...your story will be recorded as well.

subtitles.original: なんといっても、摩訶不思議な本ですから。
subtitles.english: After all, it's a mysterious book.

subtitles.original: 何が起こるか、司書である私にもわかりません。
subtitles.english: Even I, the librarian, don't know what will happen.

subtitles.original: さて、そろそろお時間ですね。
subtitles.english: Well, it's about time.

subtitles.original: またお話が聞きたくなりましたら、
subtitles.english: If you ever want to hear a story again,

subtitles.original: いつでもこの王国図書館へお越しください。
subtitles.english: please come to this Kingdom Library anytime.

subtitles.original: それでは、さようなら。
subtitles.english: Well then, goodbye.

subtitles.original: ハジマリはきっとひとつの願い
subtitles.english: The beginning is surely a single wish,

subtitles.original: それを抱いて私たちは
subtitles.english: embracing that, we are...

subtitles.original: 生まれた孤独な夜空
subtitles.english: Born into the lonely night sky,

subtitles.original: 震える指で点と点を繋げよう
subtitles.english: let's connect the dots with trembling fingers.

subtitles.original: LIVE Blu-ray 発売決定！
subtitles.english: LIVE Blu-ray Release Decided!

subtitles.original: すこん部の皆さん、準備はできてますか？
subtitles.english: Sukonbu fans, are you ready?

subtitles.original: Say! Fanfare! いきましょう！
subtitles.english: Say! Fanfare! Let's go!

subtitles.original: Say! ほら、その顔上げて みんなで手を取れば
subtitles.english: Say! Look, lift your face; if we all hold hands,

subtitles.original: Say! まだまだ道中 世界を越えよ
subtitles.english: Say! We're still in the middle of the road.

subtitles.original: Say! ほら、推し推し固まり
subtitles.english: Say! Look, the support is piling up;

subtitles.original: 止まらない専欲ですから！
subtitles.english: because it's a desire that won't stop!

subtitles.original: 夢を書きかえたら 追いかけ続けよう
subtitles.english: If we rewrite our dreams, let's keep chasing them.

subtitles.original: ともに 繋ぐ ファンファーレ Go!
subtitles.english: Together, connecting, fanfare Go!

subtitles.original: 宝物いくつか自分自身の
subtitles.english: With some treasures of my own...

subtitles.original: 輝きを見失ったときには
subtitles.english: When I lost sight of my own brilliance,

subtitles.original: 思い出してね僕らの星座は
subtitles.english: remember, our constellation...

subtitles.original: 君がいるから輝く
subtitles.english: shines because you are here.

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 無数の星の中
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! Among countless stars,

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 光を君がくれた
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! You gave me the light.

subtitles.original: もっと越えていけるさ
subtitles.english: We can go even further.

subtitles.original: スパノバ起こせ今
subtitles.english: Set off a supernova now.

subtitles.original: 何度だって飛べる
subtitles.english: We can fly any number of times.

subtitles.original: これは紛れもなく僕らの奇跡
subtitles.english: This is undoubtedly our miracle.

subtitles.original: Hi Friends!
subtitles.english: Hi Friends!

subtitles.original: ベストウィッシュ！すこん部ー！
subtitles.english: Best wishes! Sukonbu!

subtitles.original: Blu-ray 発売決定！！
subtitles.english: Blu-ray Release Decided!!
